arts.ttl: Messi AND Neymar in SHOCK summer returns to Barcelona
arts.sum: Messi departed Barcelona in the summer of 2021 amidst a flood of tears, moving on a free transfer to PSG as it became evident that the Camp Nou club could no longer afford him. Now Messi, at the age of 37, is desperate to return to Barcelona, with the Catalan club seeking to complete a stunning deal that could see the Inter Miami attacker return for the opening of the renovated Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: Marc-Andre ter Stegen offers update on Barcelona return
arts.sum: Marc-Andre ter Stegen has been sidelined since September with a severe knee injury.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Barcelona see now as “right time” to swoop for Arsenal transfer target, coming weeks “crucial”
arts.sum: Barcelona are eyeing up a summer transfer window move for Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimaraes, who remains on the radar of Arsenal and Manchester City. Hansi Flick has named a 24 man squad for the first leg of Barça's Champions League last 16 tie against Benfica. Hansi Flick's side trained at the stadium – the venue for the first leg of their last 16 tie (kick off 9pm CET) – for the final time before Wednesday's game in Lisbon.

arts.ttl: Benfica star insists he's ignoring Man Utd transfer clause amid Ruben Amorim demands
arts.sum: Manchester United have been tipped to re-sign Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras, who never made a first-team appearance for the Red Devils but has excelled in Portugal

arts.sum: Benfica host Barcelona in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie tonight. Bruno Lage’s side will be out for revenge at The Estádio da Luz. arts.ttl: Man United 'eyeing £67m move' for Barcelona's pass master who could be the ideal midfield partner for Manuel Ugarte
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly preparing to move for Barcelona midfielder Marc Casado during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona XI vs Benfica – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona continue their Champions League crusade against Benfica in Lisbon this evening. The Spanish side cross the border to take on Benfica in the first leg of their last-16 tie. arts.ttl: Jorge Mendes makes statement on Lamine Yamal contract – ‘We only spoke about Lamine’
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal is arguably the most valuable asset the club has currently, but that status naturally comes with a wage rise for the 17-year-old. A significant one.
